ab: ullaya i saninin kaniyam ruma ku takesian. kemakawang ku muka i takesian kana wawariwari driya. aw kemakawang ku muruma.
ch: 我的學校在我們家旁邊，我天天走路去學校，也走路回家。
en: My school is next to our house, I walk to school every day, and I also walk home.

ab: adri matrina naniyam takesian. aw adri kadruwan na temakakesi. marekaladam mi peniya.
ch: 我們學校不大，沒有很多學生，大家互相認識。
en: Our school is not big, there are not many students, everyone knows each other.

ab: na temakakesi piniya i, maradruk dar i renarenadran. mukasakasa malinay dra mali aw madradrayar.
ch: 所有小朋友會聚在操場，一起玩球、一起聊天。
en: All the children will gather in the playground, play ball and chat together.

ab: na sinsi driya i, kurekasa kaniyam malinay. kamawan dra sarumaenan na takesian.
ch: 老師們也會和我們一起玩，學校是個大家庭。
en: The teachers also play with us, the school is one big family.

ab: sasellap mi kana wawariwari. naniyam sasellapi pakasalesal i takakesian.
ch: 我們每天都要打掃，大家要把教室打掃乾淨。
en: We have to clean every day, and everyone has to clean the classroom.

ab: ullaya a miyasama a trau muka emitrula kana lataw. ullaya a miyasama a trau muka semellapa.
ch: 有些人去擦窗戶，有些人去掃地。
en: Some people clean the windows, some sweep the floor.

ab: muka mi driya semellapa kana repuyupuyungan i takesian. karepanini mi dra kiyakarunan aw mukasakasa mi kikarun. salaw semalesal i takesian kana wawariwari.
ch: 我們還會打掃學校的各個角落，大家分工合作，學校每天都很乾淨。
en: We will also clean every corner of the school. Everyone works together, and the school is very clean every day.
